name: UserGuiding Product Adoption API
what_it_does: No-code product adoption and user onboarding platform with REST API — enabling product teams to create in-app product tours, checklists, tooltips, hotspots, and surveys without engineering effort, with user segmentation and analytics to track onboarding completion and feature adoption.
use_cases: Querying onboarding checklist completion data for customer success health scoring
Segmenting users for targeted in-app guides based on user attributes via API
Pulling guide analytics (views, completions, drop-offs) for product analytics pipelines
Triggering UserGuiding guide display based on external events via JavaScript API
Integrating UserGuiding user data with CRM for adoption-based sales signals
not_for: Engineering-built interactive product tours (use React Joyride for code-based tours)
Complex multi-step workflow automation (use dedicated workflow tools)
Enterprise DAP with WalkMe-level governance requirements
best_when: A product team at a SaaS company needs to create onboarding flows, feature announcements, and in-app guides without engineering work, at an accessible price point.
avoid_when: You need enterprise DAP with governance and compliance features (use WalkMe or Whatfix), or you prefer code-based tour implementation.

auth.notes: API key from UserGuiding account. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. JavaScript SDK for in-app guide triggering. Webhook for guide events (view, complete, dismiss). No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Turkish company (Istanbul). Founded 2017. Raised $13M. 1,000+ SaaS customers. No-code guide builder with Chrome extension for visual creation. More affordable than WalkMe or Appcues. Strong in mid-market SaaS product adoption. NPS and survey tools included in higher plans.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for guides, users, events, and analytics. Bearer token auth. JavaScript SDK for runtime guide control. Webhook for guide interaction events. Good documentation. Guide creation primarily via visual builder UI — API is for data access and user management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Guide reads idempotent. User attribute updates idempotent by user ID. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. User identification idempotent by external ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Guides are created in visual builder UI — API cannot create guides programmatically
JavaScript SDK required for in-app guide triggering — server-side API alone is insufficient
User identification via JS SDK required before segmentation API works
Guide display is client-side — server API controls data, not rendering
GDPR consent for tracking required — implement consent before initializing SDK

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. JavaScript SDK injects content into product pages — ensure CSP headers allow UserGuiding domains. User behavior data is sensitive PII — implement proper consent.
